template.name: Standard Module Execution
template.description: Every CLI module invocation must conform to this packet. Write to the filesystem only within declared write_scope. Read only from declared read_only_files. Resume from state_files if interrupted.

fields.field: M-XXX module identifier from AGENTS.md namespace
Files this module may read but never write
Max retries before hard failure, with exponential backoff 2^n × 2s
Files/dirs that must exist after successful completion

stop_conditions.condition: HTTP 429 rate-limit persistent after 5 retries
ConnectionError persistent after 5 retries
Manifest validation: missing ticker or empty data
All tickers returned < 50% of expected trading days (systemic API failure)

artifact.description: OHLCV parquet, columns: timestamp, open, high, low, close, volume, amount

stop_conditions.condition: Missing ticker in input manifest → abort (do not skip)
NaN after normalization → check source data
Empty split → date range mismatch, check config/global.yaml splits
Session filter removes > 30% of bars → possible data corruption
Any quality gate FAILS (codebook_util < 200, entropy < 5.0, recon_mse > 0.01, per_asset_codes < 50) → stop, do NOT proceed to M-FINE-TUNE
Tokenizer download fails (HF auth — gated model)
CUDA OOM on T4 → fallback to CPU
Per-asset codes < 20 for any asset → remove from universe

artifact.description: keys: ticker → {split: {tokens, codebook_util, entropy, recon_mse, per_asset_unique_codes}}

stop_conditions.condition: Val CE > random_CE (10.0 for 1024-class) → model not learning
Train CE < Val CE - 0.5 → severe overfit (add dropout)
Val CE plateau: delta <= 0.001 for 5 consecutive evals → early stop
GPU OOM on A100 → reduce batch_size from 12 to 8
NaN in loss or gradients → check data for corrupt tokens
Modal spot preemption → heartbeat checkpoint auto-resume
Modal timeout (8h) → ensure checkpoint saves every 3 epochs

artifact.description: Best val CE weights + optimizer state

stop_conditions.condition: Checkpoint file not found → run M-FINE-TUNE first
Tokenizer not loaded (HF auth)
CUDA OOM on T4 → use CPU or reduce sub_batch_size to 2
All predictions identical (zero std) → tokenizer/model failure
Not enough tickers for top-3/bot-2 ranking → reduce N or check data
All predictions correlated → no spread → check M-TOKENIZE per-asset codes
Sharpe < 0.5 → metrics gate FAIL → go to Phase 3 iteration
Win Rate < 0.45 → check prediction bias
MaxDD > 0.50 → reduce position size
PSR < 0.3 → Sharpe not statistically robust
IC mean < 0.0 → weak classification signal

artifact.description: keys: {sharpe, max_dd, win_rate, profit_factor, calmar, psr, dsr, ic_mean, total_return, total_trades, long_trades, short_trades}
(T,) float64 — cumulative equity value per bar

template.name: Incremental Change Specification
template.description: Triggered when code changes affect a subset of the pipeline. Defines what modules need re-execution and what artifacts need regeneration.

fields.field: Git commit hash of the last verified state
All downstream modules that must re-execute (topological closure)
Which manifest keys changed and why

manifest_delta_schema.field: Specific keys that differ from prior manifest
Expected downstream effects if re-run not triggered

change.reason: New tokenizer weights produce different token distributions
change.cascade_failure: All downstream modules would use stale tokens, predictions invalid

change.reason: Split date range change shifts bar counts between sets
change.cascade_failure: Train/val overlap, leakage, backtest uses wrong bars

example.name: Strategy logic changed (e.g. S01 BB filter)

change.reason: Strategy entry/exit logic change affects trade outputs
change.cascade_failure: None — predictions unchanged, only trade log stale

template.name: Module Failure Handoff
template.description: When a module fails, this packet captures the exact symptom for exact-match lookup in docs/operations/failures.md. The next agent uses this to diagnose without replaying the failure.

field.name: symptom_exact
field.example: RuntimeError: CUDA out of memory. Tried to allocate 2.00 GiB.

fields.field: Reference to exact entry in docs/operations/failures.md
What was already tried before handoff (prevents re-attempting)
Does this failure block all downstream modules?
Concrete next action for the receiving agent

template.failures_catalog:
<entry id="F-DATA-04" module="M-FETCH" symptom="Empty holidays — bars < 50% of trading days" fix="Expected — skip if < min_bars threshold" blocking="false" />
<entry id="F-TOKEN-01" module="M-TOKENIZE" symptom="Low codebook utilization (< 50)" fix="Contingency: retrain tokenizer on MOEX §2.2" blocking="true" />
<entry id="F-BACKTEST-02" module="M-BACKTEST" symptom="Sharpe < 0.5 (quality gate fail)" fix="Go to Phase 3 iteration loop" blocking="false" note="Model works but too weak" />

template.name: Architecture & Data Assumptions
template.description: Every assumption that the project depends on. If violated, the model may silently produce garbage — must be validated and have a contingency if broken.

assumption.statement: KronosTokenizer-2k (trained on ALI09988 5-min bars) generalizes to MOEX 10-min bars without retraining
assumption.validation_method: Phase 0 quality gates: codebook_util >= 200, entropy >= 5.0, recon_mse <= 0.01
assumption.if_violated_action: Contingency §2.2: Retrain tokenizer on MOEX (8+8 bit) or fall back to raw OHLCV with linear projection

assumption.statement: Per-window z-score normalization (mu,sigma per 506-bar window) removes price-level differences sufficiently for multi-asset training without explicit asset-ID embedding
assumption.validation_method: Per-asset codebook utilization (V-M-TOKENIZE-04): all 21 assets >= 50 unique codes. Cross-correlation RMS < 0.5 (V-M-TOKENIZE-05)
assumption.if_violated_action: Sector-neutral z-scoring. If still fails (< 0.3 Sharpe): add asset-ID embedding (architecture change, risk to pre-trained weights)

assumption.statement: 10-min bars have higher SNR than 5-min bars (less microstructure noise, stronger trends)
assumption.validation_method: Compare prediction metrics (Sharpe, WR) against hypothetical 5-min baseline if Phase 2 Sharpe fails
assumption.if_violated_action: Test with 5-min data via MOEX marketdata engine (supports interval=5)

assumption.statement: CE loss on discrete tokens avoids mean collapse (unlike MSE on log returns) and produces distributional predictions that rank well cross-sectionally
assumption.validation_method: Phase 1 val CE < 0.9 * random_CE (V-M-FINETUNE-03). Phase 2 IC mean >= 0.02 (V-M-BACKTEST-05)
assumption.if_violated_action: If CE converges but IC is zero: tokens encode patterns but not directional signal → add ranking loss (ListMLE). If CE > random_CE: model architecture wrong

assumption.statement: MOEX ISS API is reliable and returns complete data for all 21 tickers within the 2023-2026 window
assumption.validation_method: Data quality assertions (V-DATA-01 through V-DATA-05): no NaN, >= 500 bars, monotonic timestamps, volume > 0
assumption.if_violated_action: Remove ticker from universe if < min_bars. Use fallback data source. Retry with exponential backoff

assumption.statement: Dividend adjustment is low priority — affects ~1-2 bars/year/ticker, skip for Phase 0-1
assumption.validation_method: Check preprocessed data: sudden −2% to −10% drops on ex-div dates
assumption.if_violated_action: Implement dividend adjustment via MOEX ISS /securities/{ticker}/dividends.json (Phase 2+)

assumption.statement: Tokenizer frozen during fine-tune preserves pre-trained VQ-VAE representation. Predictor adapts to MOEX token distribution
assumption.validation_method: Verify all tokenizer params have requires_grad=False (V-M-TOKENIZE-07). Val CE decreases (V-M-FINETUNE-01)
assumption.if_violated_action: If val CE does not decrease: unfreeze tokenizer partially (last 2 encoder layers) or retrain tokenizer on MOEX

assumption.statement: A100 40GB is available on Modal and fits batch=12, L=512 with bf16 (~10-12GB VRAM)
assumption.validation_method: Modal provision check before fine-tune: verify GPU type, VRAM available
assumption.if_violated_action: Reduce batch_size to 8, increase grad_accum to 3. If no A100: use T4 with batch=2 (6× slower, 6h total)

assumption.statement: Walk-forward split (train 2023→2025, val 2025-02→2025-09, test 2025-09→2026-05) prevents overfitting and gives honest OOS metrics
assumption.if_violated_action: If val >> test: overfit to val period → add dropout 0.2, reduce epochs. If both negative: fundamental problem → Phase 3 iteration

assumption.statement: Cross-sectional ranking (top-3 long, bot-2 short) with session enforcement produces positive expected return
assumption.validation_method: IC mean >= 0.02, Sharpe >= 0.5. Session violation count == 0
assumption.if_violated_action: Try top-2/bot-2, top-5/bot-3, or pure long-only. Adjust session entry window

template.name: Phase Completion Checkpoints
template.description: After each phase, record what was produced, what passed verification, and what the next step is. This enables agent handoff without context loss.

checkpoint.name: Tokenizer Quality Gate Complete
checkpoint.next: Run M-PREPROCESS → M-TOKENIZE. If all gates pass: proceed to M-DATASET → M-FINE-TUNE (Phase 1). If any gate fails: go to contingency §2.2.

checkpoint.name: Fine-tune Complete
checkpoint.next: Load best checkpoint into M-PREDICT. Run inference on test split. If val CE diverges or does not improve: check tokenizer quality. Proceed to Phase 2.

checkpoint.name: Backtest Complete
checkpoint.next: If all gates pass: model accepted for alpha generation. Deploy inference pipeline. If any gate fails: go to Phase 3 iteration loop (§2.6 Phase 3). Calibrate hyperparameters (4-pass sweep).

template.name: Inter-Step Manifest Validation
template.description: Each module validates the previous module's manifest before executing. If validation fails, exit with code 1. Do NOT skip validation.

step.fail_action: Exit code 1. Print: "Missing ticker: {ticker}" or "Empty data: {ticker}".

condition.key: all 3 splits (train, val, test) present per ticker

step.fail_action: Exit code 1. Print: "Shape mismatch: {ticker}/{split} expected (T,6) got {shape}".

condition.key: tokens present per split per ticker
quality gates passed (codebook_util, entropy, recon_mse in manifest)
no gate key has failed marker

step.fail_action: Exit code 1. Print: "Quality gate not passed. Run M-TOKENIZE --quality-check first."

validation_steps.step: <condition key="val_ce < random_CE (from history.json)" /> Exit code 1. Print: "Model not trained or checkpoint missing. Run M-FINE-TUNE."

condition.key: predictions exist for all 21 tickers per split

step.fail_action: Exit code 1. Print: "Missing predictions for {ticker}/{split} or shape mismatch."

grace:operational-packets.template:
<budget phase="0" gpu="T4/CPU" total="< 2 GB">
<item component="Temporary token tensors" size="< 0.2 GB" />
<budget phase="2" gpu="T4-16GB" total="< 0.5 GB">
<item component="Autoregressive step activations" size="< 0.3 GB" />
<budget phase="2" gpu="CPU" total="< 8 GB RAM">
<item component="Backtest trade log (in memory)" size="< 500 MB" /> <item component="Equity curve + metrics" size="< 100 MB" />
